title: Understanding a Science Fiction Extract and Using Parenthesis

questions.question: What does "marauders" mean?
options: a fictional piece of technology in this story
a helper, usually for a bad deed
thieves or raiders who steal things
questions.correct_answer: thieves or raiders who steal things
questions.explanation: "marauders" means: thieves or raiders who steal things

questions.question: What does "accomplice" mean?
options: a fictional piece of technology in this story
a helper, usually for a bad deed
thieves or raiders who steal things
questions.correct_answer: a helper, usually for a bad deed
questions.explanation: "accomplice" means: a helper, usually for a bad deed

questions.question: Fill in the blank: Read science fiction ______ to expand your imagination.
questions.explanation: The full sentence is: "Read science fiction stories to expand your imagination."

questions.question: Which of the following is TRUE about this topic?
options: Read science fiction stories to expand your imagination.
Summarise texts to understand the main points concisely.
Use parenthetic commas or dashes to add extra information into sentences, making your writing richer.
Improve your vocabulary by logging new words and using mnemonics (memory tricks).
questions.correct_answer: Improve your vocabulary by logging new words and using mnemonics (memory tricks).
questions.explanation: Correct! "Improve your vocabulary by logging new words and using mnemonics (memory tricks)." is one of the key things to remember.
